_doc: EXAMPLE OpenAI-compatible local-endpoint config for the M7 shadow wrapper's optional --mode live. This is a PLACEHOLDER, not a secret and not a real internal host. Copy to a local (gitignored) config and edit for your own endpoint. Dry-run mode needs none of this.
_base_url_doc: OpenAI-compatible base URL (e.g. a local llama-swap / vLLM / Ollama-OpenAI shim). The wrapper POSTs {base_url}/chat/completions.
_model_doc: Model id the endpoint serves. NOTE: a GGUF chat endpoint returns OUTPUT TEXT only — no router logits — so live prompts have NO telemetry feature row and score policy=null.
_api_key_doc: Most local endpoints ignore this. Do NOT put a real secret here; use an env var in your own local config if your endpoint needs auth.
_timeout_s_doc: Per-request timeout in seconds for live mode.
